---
title: "Real-Data Ensemble — Prepare Inputs"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

This workbook syncs the selected 10 GTEx loci from the annotation repo into
`test_susine`, rebuilds the manifest, and previews one aligned locus bundle.

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
here::i_am("vignettes/real data pipeline/prepare_real_data_inputs_workbook.Rmd")
library(here)
library(devtools)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)

susine_path <- here("..", "susine")
if (file.exists(file.path(susine_path, "DESCRIPTION"))) {
  options(test_susine.local_susine_path = normalizePath(susine_path, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE))
  devtools::load_all(susine_path)
}
devtools::load_all(".")
```

# 1. User Configuration

```{r config}
source_repo_root <- "/storage/work/mgc5166/Annotations/eQTL_annotations_for_susine"
dest_root <- here("data", "real_case_studies", "selected_10_loci")
source_mu0_name <- "representative_gene_sample_n10_annotation_selection"
source_annotation_summary <- NULL
loci <- NULL
```

# 2. Sync Selected Loci

```{r sync}
synced <- test_susine::sync_real_data_inputs(
  source_repo_root = source_repo_root,
  dest_root = dest_root,
  source_mu0_name = source_mu0_name,
  source_annotation_summary = source_annotation_summary,
  loci = loci
)

manifest <- synced$manifest
kable(manifest)
```

# 3. Preview One Bundle

```{r preview}
preview_locus <- manifest$locus_id[[1]]

bundle <- test_susine:::load_real_data_locus_bundle(
  locus_id = preview_locus,
  manifest_path = file.path(dest_root, "locus_manifest.csv"),
  repo_root = here()
)

alignment_preview <- bundle$variant_map %>%
  dplyr::select(
    variant_id,
    ld_matrix_index,
    z_score,
    beta_hat_std,
    annotation_a,
    baseline_c_l
  ) %>%
  dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)

kable(alignment_preview)
```

# 4. Bundle Diagnostics

```{r diagnostics}
list(
  locus_id = bundle$locus_id,
  gene_name = bundle$gene_name,
  n_variants = nrow(bundle$variant_map),
  n_sample = bundle$n_sample,
  baseline_c_l = bundle$baseline_c_l,
  cor_annotation_z = cor(bundle$a, bundle$z, use = "pairwise.complete.obs"),
  cor_annotation_beta_hat_std = cor(bundle$a, bundle$beta_hat_std, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
)
```
